IF DEFENDANTS LEARN OF NEW WITNESSES AND OR DOCUMENTS, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED PREVIOUSLY.
